question: What is the base-10 logarithm of the atomic oxygen erosion yield of the polymer Polyvinyltoluene represented by SMILES [*]CC([*])c1cccc(C)c1, with no coating, oriented in the ram direction for a mission time of 5.8 years, subjected to a solar exposure of 11200 equivalent sun hours and an atomic oxygen fluence of 8.990e+21 atom/cm^2?
